Declaration
1) Kindly check your GSTIN. Please inform if any error is found within 7 days, failing which we will not be responsible for receipt of GST credit. 2) Interest @ 18% p.a. will be charged on overdue payments. 3) Our risk & responsibility ceases as soon as goods leave our premises.
